title: Catastrophic health plans for people with hardship exemptions
page_name: Catastrophic health plans for people with hardship exemptions
page_topic: Catastrophic health plans for people with hardship exemptions
content:
Learn more about Catastrophic health plans for people with cancellations and hardship exemptions.

If you want to renew a Catastrophic plan from a prior year or apply for new coverage, you must first update your Marketplace application, either online at HealthCare.gov or by calling the Marketplace Call Center, with a valid Exemption Certificate Number (ECN). Then, you’ll be able to complete your enrollment.
